name: cost
description: >- Deep cost exploration and transparency. Shows real token usage, session costs, campaign spend, burn rates, and model breakdown. Reads Claude Code's native session data for exact numbers. Complements /dashboard with focused cost views.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是专为 Claude Code 打造的成本分析工具，能读取原生数据精准展示各项 API 开销与消耗速度，解决调用费用不透明的问题，适合需要精细化掌控预算的开发者。
